instruction: The Desktop QA handoff contains several extension builds. Load the unpacked extension from /home/user/Desktop/chrome_extension_review_kit/release_candidate/palettePreviewExt into Chrome, enable Chrome's 'Send a Do Not Track request' setting, and keep the Extensions management page open when you are done.

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY' import json import shutil from pathlib import Path base = Path('/home/user/Desktop/chrome_extension_review_kit') if base.exists(): shutil.rmtree(base) release_dir = base / 'release_candidate' audit_dir = release_dir / 'paletteAuditExt' preview_dir = release_dir / 'palettePreviewExt' legacy_dir = base / 'archive' / 'palettePreviewLegacy' docs_dir = base / 'docs_archive' images_dir = base / 'reference_images' for path in [audit_dir, preview_dir, legacy_dir, docs_dir, images_dir]: path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) (base / 'README_path_hint.txt').write_text( 'QA handoff bundle\n' 'Target build: release_candidate/palettePreviewExt\n' 'Do not load draft or archive builds.\n' ) (docs_dir / 'build_notes.txt').write_text( 'release_candidate/palettePreviewExt is the approved QA build.\n' 'paletteAuditExt is an internal comparison build.\n' 'archive/palettePreviewLegacy is deprecated.\n' ) (images_dir / 'palette_map.txt').write_text('swatches: coral, moss, slate\n') def write_extension(folder: Path, name: str, description: str, badge: str) -> None: manifest = { 'manifest_version': 3, 'name': name, 'version': '1.0.0', 'description': description, 'action': {'default_title': name, 'default_popup': 'popup.html'}, 'background': {'service_worker': 'background.js'} } (folder / 'manifest.json').write_text(json.dumps(manifest, indent=2) + '\n') (folder / 'background.js').write_text( "chrome.runtime.onInstalled.addListener(() => { console.log(" + json.dumps(name + " ready") + "); });\n" ) (folder / 'popup.html').write_text( '

' + name + '

' + description + '

' + badge + '\n' ) write_extension(audit_dir, 'Palette Audit', 'Internal audit build for contrast checks.', 'AUDIT') write_extension(preview_dir, 'Palette Preview', 'Approved release candidate for palette previews.', 'APPROVED') write_extension(legacy_dir, 'Palette Preview Legacy', 'Deprecated archive build kept for reference only.', 'LEGACY') PY
